title_ar: سيرة علي بن أبي طالب — الجزء 117
title_id: 2. Pengangkatan Para Gubernur pada Masa Kekhalifahan Ali
content_en: at the time of 'Ali (&) Allegiance was sworn to 'Ali (a) as caliph after the murder of 'Uthmin (&). There was turmoil in different regions of the state , ., as a result of 'Uthmin's murder; hence 'Ali (&) was given allegiance in difficult circumstances, in which the Islamic state began to lose a great deal of its stability and energy. This unrest emerged clearly in Madinah itself, and things became chaotic in other regions of the state, too. The sincere advisers and consultants sensed the seriousness of what was taking place, so some of them offered sincere advice to 'Ali from the outset, especially with regard to his governors.227 2.1. Ali's attitude towards the governors of 'Uthmsn, and his appointment of his relatives 2.1.1. 'Ali's attitude towards the governors of 'Uthmiin Amir al-Mu'mineen 'Ali (&) understood fully that one of the .. main causes of the turmoil was that some people were not pleased with the governors of 'Uthmk (&). That was because of the rumours spread by the leaders of the turmoil against 'Uthmsn (&) Govemor.~ at the time of 'Ali ibn Abi Tcilib and his governors, not because they were incapable or unjust. Many contemporary writers, however, in their discussion of 'Ali's policies in appointing governors, start by saying that 'Ali (&) would not have agreed to leave 'UthmWs governors in their positions for one minute after he was appointed caliph, and that what prevented him from doing so was his religious commitment and sincerity.228 How terrible this accusation is against 'Uthmin (&) and his governors. I have refuted it in my book Tayseer al-Kareem al-Manncinfi Seerat 'Uthmin ibn 'Affcin, where I devoted an entire section to discussing the facts about the governors of 'Utbmin (&).229 Whoever wishes to know more may refer to it. content_id: Baiat kepada Ali radhiallahu anhu sebagai khalifah diberikan setelah terbunuhnya Utsman radhiallahu anhu. Terjadi kekacauan di berbagai wilayah negara sebagai akibat dari pembunuhan Utsman. Oleh karena itu, baiat kepada Ali diberikan dalam keadaan sulit, di mana negara Islam mulai kehilangan banyak kestabilan dan energinya. Kerusuhan ini muncul jelas di Madinah sendiri, dan keadaan juga menjadi kacau di wilayah-wilayah negara lainnya. Para penasihat yang tulus merasakan keseriusan apa yang terjadi, sehingga beberapa di antara mereka memberikan nasihat tulus kepada Ali sejak awal, terutama berkenaan dengan para gubernurnya. Sikap Ali terhadap Para Gubernur Utsman dan Pengangkatan Sanak Kerabatnya: Amirul Mukminin Ali radhiallahu anhu memahami sepenuhnya bahwa salah satu penyebab utama kekacauan adalah bahwa beberapa orang tidak puas dengan para gubernur Utsman radhiallahu anhu. Hal itu terjadi karena rumor yang disebarkan oleh para pemimpin kekacauan terhadap Utsman dan para gubernurnya, bukan karena ketidakmampuan atau ketidakadilan mereka. Namun banyak penulis kontemporer, dalam pembahasan mereka tentang kebijakan Ali dalam mengangkat gubernur, mulai dengan mengatakan bahwa Ali tidak akan setuju untuk membiarkan para gubernur Utsman dalam jabatan mereka bahkan sebentar pun setelah ia diangkat sebagai khalifah, dan bahwa yang menghalanginya adalah komitmen agamanya dan ketulusannya. Betapa buruknya tuduhan ini terhadap Utsman radhiallahu anhu dan para gubernurnya. Penulis telah membantahnya dalam bukunya Taysir al-Karim al-Mannan fi Sirat Amir al-Mukminin Utsman ibn Affan, di mana beliau mendedikasikan seluruh bagian untuk membahas fakta-fakta tentang para gubernur Utsman. Siapapun yang ingin mengetahui lebih lanjut dapat merujuk padanya. Mereka yang mengkritik para gubernur Utsman mengandalkan riwayat-riwayat yang diketahui lemah dan tidak dapat dipercaya dalam sejarah Islam. Kebijakan pengangkatan gubernur Ali mencerminkan prinsip-prinsip kepemimpinan yang mengutamakan kompetensi dan kepercayaan, serta tanggung jawab yang besar dalam menjaga kestabilan negara Islam di tengah tantangan berat.
content_ar: at the time of 'علي (&) Allegiance was sworn to 'علي (a) as caliph بعد the murder of 'Uthmin (&). There was turmoil in different regions of the state , ., ونتيجة لذلك of 'Uthmin's murder; ومن ثَم 'علي (&) was given allegiance in difficult circumstances, in which the Islamic state began to lose a great deal of its stability and energy. This unrest emerged clearly in المدينة المنورة itself, and things became chaotic in other regions of the state, أيضاً. The sincere advisers and consultants sensed the seriousness of what was taking place, لذا some of them offered sincere advice to 'علي from the outset, ولا سيما فيما يتعلق بـ his governors.227 2.1. علي's attitude towards the governors of 'Uthmsn, and his appointment of his relatives 2.1.1. 'علي's attitude towards the governors of 'Uthmiin Amir al-Mu'mineen 'علي (&) understood fully that one of the .. الرئيسي causes of the turmoil was that some people were not pleased with the governors of 'Uthmk (&). That was لأن of the rumours spread by the leaders of the turmoil against 'Uthmsn (&) Govemor.~ at the time of 'علي ibn Abi Tcilib and his governors, not لأن they were incapable or unjust. Many contemporary writers, غير أن, in their discussion of 'علي's policies in appointing governors, start by saying that 'علي (&) would not have agreed to leave 'UthmWs governors in their positions for one minute بعد he was appointed caliph, and that what prevented him from doing لذا was his religious commitment and sincerity.228 How terrible this accusation is against 'Uthmin (&) and his governors. I have refuted it in my الكتاب Tayseer al-Kareem al-Manncinfi Seerat 'Uthmin ibn 'Affcin, where I devoted an entire الفصل to discussing the facts about the governors of 'Utbmin (&).229 Whoever wishes لمعرفة more may refer to it.
